comment: Build-correctness and rendered-workflow gate: zero-dependency unit tests over the DOM-free episode/preset/moment model, a preview-build smoke check, a headless Chrome rendered workflow that uploads generated local WebM files through the shipped Host/Guest controls and decodes blob-backed pixels in the composed preview across Split/Stack/Spotlight — including per-region Stack row pixels and Spotlight host-dominant/PiP geometry — surviving preset switches with export still enabled, a headless social-context workflow that enters distinct per-speaker social links through the real inputs and confirms they store per speaker and survive preset switches, a headless export workflow confirming playable non-silent exports and repeated exports after preset switches, a headless custom-layout workflow confirming edit/cancel/save behavior and export with saved templates, and a headless timed-moments workflow that adds title/callout moments through the real UI, verifies range-limited appearance in preview, verifies persistence across presets, and confirms those overlays are burned into exported video frames in-range but not out-of-range. No seeded product media, committed fixture output, or verifier-only product paths are used. Runs in the maintainer's browser-capable sandbox image (Node 22 + Chromium); each browser check resolves CHROME_BIN from the image's playwright install when not already set.

checks.name: rendered-preview
checks.run: CHROME_BIN="${CHROME_BIN:-$(find /ms-playwright -maxdepth 3 -type f -name chrome -path '*chrome-linux*' 2>/dev/null | head -n1)}" node scripts/verify-rendered-preview.mjs

checks.name: rendered-social
checks.run: CHROME_BIN="${CHROME_BIN:-$(find /ms-playwright -maxdepth 3 -type f -name chrome -path '*chrome-linux*' 2>/dev/null | head -n1)}" node scripts/verify-social-context.mjs

checks.name: rendered-export
checks.run: CHROME_BIN="${CHROME_BIN:-$(find /ms-playwright -maxdepth 3 -type f -name chrome -path '*chrome-linux*' 2>/dev/null | head -n1)}" node scripts/verify-export.mjs

checks.name: rendered-custom-layout
checks.run: CHROME_BIN="${CHROME_BIN:-$(find /ms-playwright -maxdepth 3 -type f -name chrome -path '*chrome-linux*' 2>/dev/null | head -n1)}" node scripts/verify-custom-layout.mjs

checks.name: rendered-timed-moments
checks.run: CHROME_BIN="${CHROME_BIN:-$(find /ms-playwright -maxdepth 3 -type f -name chrome -path '*chrome-linux*' 2>/dev/null | head -n1)}" node scripts/verify-timed-moments.mjs
